heading:
Lapunti
Karilyon
description: The UP Diliman chapter of Lapunti Arnis De Abanico International (LADAI). A family and community for learning, practice, and advancement in the Filipino martial art of Lapunti Arnis De Abanico.
details: Co-founded in 2010, officially recognized as a Lapunti chapter in 2011 with the personal blessings of SGM Undo Caburnay.
Named after the iconic UP Carillon Tower — our meeting place, training ground, and symbol of tradition and community.
Open to beginners and seasoned practitioners from all backgrounds.

training.venue: UP Theater (Villamor Hall) entrance, beside the UP Carillon Tower
training.location: University of the Philippines Diliman, Quezon City, Philippines
